problem: Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear

hypothesis: Optical rectenna for direct photon-to-electron conversion may resolve Is zero-point vacuum energy extractable as usable power — quantum thermodynamics unclear by activating at the systems level.
